biology.reason: Biology 3D generation is disabled by default for this MVP.
biology.suggestion: Use a 2D photo or labeled diagram for biology now. You can loosen this policy later for abstract non-figurative biology content.

history.reason: History is outside the 3D lab roadmap for this MVP.
history.suggestion: Use a 2D timeline, map, source image, or reading material instead of a 3D lab.
